title: Autotuner: stats
description: Ruby process memory and object metrics from Autotuner, emitted periodically by the Honeybadger plugin. Field names are dynamic and depend on the Autotuner version and enabled checks.

request_id.description: Rails request UUID, present on any event fired during a web request context. Merged globally by the Honeybadger agent.

additionalProperties.description: Dynamic metric value (e.g. heap_allocated, heap_retained, live_objects, gc_count).
